call_transfer_rules.transfer_on: if customer requests to speak to someone

after_hours_flow_summary: forward calls to Ben for GNM pressure washing, otherwise do not dispatch
office_hours_flow_summary: answer calls, provide service call fee information if requested
call_forwarding_setup: set up to forward calls to Clara if Ben does not answer or declines
notes: Ben's Electric Solutions Team is setting up Clara to handle incoming calls, with a focus on new clients and service calls. The system will be configured to forward calls to Ben if he does not answer or declines, and to provide service call fee information if requested.
